name: Marvel Avengers: Beyond Earth's Mightiest Action Figure Set - 5pk (Target Exclusive)
description:
Marvel fans ages 4 and up can imagine saving the world with their favorite super heroes with these Marvel Avengers action figures! This Target exclusive multipack features five 6-inch-scale action figures with articulation for fun posing during play or display. Characters include Thor, Iron Man, Hulk, Captain America, and Black Panther, and feature classic Marvel design and deco. Thor and Captain America also include their own character-inspired accessory! Add this epic action figure set to any Marvel toy collection or give as a gift for any occasion.

Copyright MARVEL. All trademarks and registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
© 2023 Hasbro. Hasbro and all related terms are trademarks of Hasbro.

Includes 5 figures and 2 accessories.
Figure scale: 6 inches
Ages 4 and up.
WARNING: Small parts may be generated. Not for children under 3 years.
